source: I missed three deadlines this month. I keep telling my team I am fine, but I am exhausted and ashamed.
target: It seemed to me, in that uneasy hour, that i missed three deadlines this month. I keep telling my team I am fine, but I am exhausted and ashamed. and this simple fact, once spoken inwardly, turned into a private accusation against my own conscience.

source: I missed three deadlines this month. I keep telling my team I am fine, but I am exhausted and ashamed.
target: As though recalled by a fragrance hidden in time, i missed three deadlines this month. I keep telling my team I am fine, but I am exhausted and ashamed.; and before I could resist, memory had already arranged the scene with its old, patient precision.

source: On the train home, I smelled rain on my coat and suddenly remembered my grandmother's kitchen.
